scope: Resolve the MVP-011 blocking finding that exact protocol examples embedded in the MVP plan did not validate against the implemented Rust protocol/schema.
summary: Updated reports/autocomplete-engine-mvp-plan-2026-05-28.json protocol examples to include protocol_version: 1.
Replaced placeholder request_id values with the valid v1 fixture UUID 018f160e-7152-7b43-9d9a-6083e0bd3cc8.
Added a protocol regression test that loads the exact MVP plan examples and validates them through generated JSON Schema, public deserialization, and semantic Validate.

tdd_evidence.red: Added crates/autocomplete-protocol/tests/plan_examples.rs; cargo test -p autocomplete-protocol mvp_plan_autocomplete_examples_validate_against_public_protocol_contract failed because protocol.autocomplete_request_example did not validate against generated JSON Schema.
tdd_evidence.green: Updated the MVP plan request/response examples with protocol_version: 1 and valid fixture UUID request_id values; the targeted plan-example test then passed.

commands_run.result: failed before the plan fix, confirming the regression test caught MVP-011-I001
passed and reported schema_valid=true, deserialize=ok, semantic_valid=true for request, ok response, and error response examples

boundary_notes: Did not weaken the protocol_version requirement or UUID request_id contract.
Did not add HTTP server, provider, postprocessing, VS Code, or Obsidian functionality.
Only the MVP plan examples, a protocol regression test, and this handoff were changed.
mvp_011_recheck_assessment: The specific MVP-011 blocking finding should now be passable after independent recheck: the exact embedded MVP plan request, ok response, and error response examples validate against generated schemas, deserialize through AutocompleteRequest/AutocompleteResponse, and pass semantic Validate. MVP-011 should still be independently rerun before being marked trusted.
worktree_notes: Pre-existing unrelated deleted reports/orchestration/* files and untracked .agents/.claude/.pi-workers/archive/mvp orchestration files were visible before this task and were not modified intentionally.
Did not read tmp/, archive/, prompt-buffer.md, or unrelated ~/dev directories.
